description: Implement endpoint check functionality to verify Claude Code network traffic

userStories.title: Implement ccsw check command with sudo network verification
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to implement a check command that verifies Claude Code network traffic matches the expected ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL endpoint using sudo permissions.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement ccsw_check function in lib/core.sh with proper sudo validation
Read ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL from active profile's config.json
Use network inspection tools (ss/tcpcdump) to verify traffic goes to expected endpoint
Return appropriate exit codes (0=success, 1=error, 2=no active profile, 3=no sudo)
Provide clear error messages for network inspection failures
Handle cases where network inspection tools are not available
Include help documentation for the check command
Typecheck passes (shellcheck passes)

userStories.title: Add check.sh library for network inspection functionality
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create a dedicated library for network inspection operations that can be reused and tested independently.
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/check.sh with network inspection functions
Implement check_network_traffic() function using ss or tcpdump
Parse ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL to extract hostname for verification
Handle both HTTP and HTTPS URL schemes
Provide mockable functions for testing
Include proper error handling and logging
Source check.sh from core.sh when needed
Typecheck passes (shellcheck passes)

userStories.title: Write unit tests for check command functionality
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to comprehensive unit tests for the endpoint check functionality to ensure reliability and proper error handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/test_check.bats with unit tests for check command
Test successful endpoint verification scenario
Test missing ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL configuration
Test invalid URL parsing
Test missing sudo permissions
Test unavailable network tools
Test network traffic mismatch scenarios
All tests pass with bats-core
Typecheck passes (shellcheck passes)
